name: Verify that a new user can create a template and use it to create the document for selfsign.
fullName: MainAppPages/CreateTemplate.spec.js#Templates Verify that a new user can create a template and use it to create the document for selfsign.

steps.name: Click getByRole('button', { name: 'Go to next step' })

Click getByRole('button', { name: 'Go to next step' })
Click locator('//button[@type="submit" and @class="op-btn op-btn-primary" and text()="Add"]')
Expect "toBeVisible" getByRole('button', { name: 'I confirm & agree to continue' })
Click getByRole('button', { name: 'I confirm & agree to continue' })
Click locator('//div[@class="flex justify-center"]//i[@class="fa-light fa-cloud-upload-alt uploadImgLogo text-base-content"]')
Wait for selector locator('//div[@class="flex justify-center"]//span[ text()="Draw"]')
click on the date field on the signer pad
Select date from calendar by aria-label 'Choose Friday, July 24th, 2026'
Click locator('//div[@class="flex justify-center"]//i[@class="fa-light fa-cloud-upload-alt uploadImgLogo text-base-content"]')
